ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the order is deleted or not */,
  "order_total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the billing address */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the product category */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the supplier */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 10x10x10) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, customer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the user's address */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date and time the order status was updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the order status change (e.g., 'out of stock', 'address issue') */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order history */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the history */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., 'order created', 'order updated', 'order shipped') */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred (e.g., 'warehouse', 'shipping center') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the supplier's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
